creator: dbaker@neosoft.com
text:
Hi, I uploaded upsd-2.0.tar.gz to /pub/FreeBSD/incoming on freefall.

The work/source gz-tarball dosen't have a home, so I put it
on ftp://ftp2.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/distfiles/upsd-2.0.tar.gz. All in
all, it should be in LOCAL_PORTS, but until your review it, that will do.

Thanks a lot,

Daniel Baker
Network Administrator
NeoSoft, Inc.
